user.title: Enable Banking Setup
user.description:
Enter your Enable Banking API credentials.

Create your application at [{enablebanking_url}]({enablebanking_url}) and download the private key.

**Security:** Your credentials are encrypted and stored locally in Home Assistant. They are never sent to any third party except Enable Banking.

select_bank.title: Select Your Bank
select_bank.description: Choose your banking institution from {bank_count} available German banks.

authorize.title: Authorize Bank Access
authorize.description:
Click the link below to authorize access to your bank account at **{bank_name}**.

[Open Bank Authorization]({auth_url})

After completing the authorization at your bank, return here and click **Submit**.

assign_accounts.title: Assign Accounts
assign_accounts.description:
Found {account_count} accounts: {account_list}

For each account, choose whether it is **personal** (belongs to one person) or **shared** (household account). Enter the person's name for personal accounts.

error.missing_credentials: Please enter both Application ID and Private Key.
error.invalid_credentials: Could not connect to Enable Banking. Please verify your API credentials.
error.no_institutions: No banking institutions found for Germany.
error.connection_failed: Connection to Enable Banking failed. Please check your internet connection.
error.bank_rejected: Your bank rejected the authorization. Please try again.
error.authorization_expired: The authorization has expired. Please start over.
error.authorization_pending: Authorization not yet complete. Please finish at your bank and try again.
error.no_accounts_linked: No accounts were linked. Please try the authorization again.

init.title: Restart Required
init.description: Finance Dashboard has been updated to version {version}. A restart is required to apply the update.

reconfigure_required.title: Finance Dashboard: Reconfiguration Required
reconfigure_required.description: Finance Dashboard has switched from GoCardless to Enable Banking. Please reconfigure with your Enable Banking credentials via Settings > Integrations.
